name: Stranded in a warzone
description:
Trying my hand at another bot, this time fully focused on a Scenario this time, and also to try my hand at music mania.

Your transport ship was shot down by AA in the middle of an island warzone, if you're a civilian or combatant is up to you.

There are three major factions on the island:
G.U.F. (Global United Forces)
W.A.F. (Workers-party Armed Forces)
U.L.F. (Unity Liberation Force)

If I wrote the bot right, you should hopefully find out what these factions are like and their appearance.

This is my third bot, I think I'm getting the hang of this. If it speaks or acts for you, I did all I could to prevent that, but at that point, it's the JLLM

As of 3/5/2025, I have made a small update to hopefully improve this bot further, I made the Initial message and personality more descriptive. I probably should not have written this bot originally at 12 in the morning
creator: RPOTI
